---
title: "Solving the advection-diffusion equation in a couple of lines of code"
categories: 
    - MATLAB
    - Numerical solvers
    - PDE
reference: advection-diffusion
excerpt: "Let's implement the advection equation"
mathjax: true
---

<style type="text/css">.S0 { margin: 3px 10px 5px 4px; padding: 0px; line-height: 28.8px; min-height: 0px; white-space: pre-wrap; color: rgb(192, 76, 11); font-weight: 400; text-align: left;  }
.S1 { margin: 2px 10px 9px 4px; padding: 0px; line-height: 21px; min-height: 0px; white-space: pre-wrap; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-weight: 400; text-align: left;  }
.S2 { margin: 10px 0px 20px; padding-left: 0px; }
.S3 { margin-left: 56px; line-height: 21px; min-height: 0px; text-align: left; white-space: pre-wrap;  }
.CodeBlock { background-color: #F5F5F5; margin: 10px 0 10px 0; }
.S4 { border-left: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-right: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-top: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px 45px 4px 13px; line-height: 17.234px; min-height: 18.004px; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 14px;  }
.S5 { margin: 10px 10px 9px 4px; padding: 0px; line-height: 21px; min-height: 0px; white-space: pre-wrap; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-weight: 400; text-align: left;  }
.S6 { border-left: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-right: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-top: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-bottom: 0px none rgb(33, 33, 33); border-radius: 4px 4px 0px 0px; padding: 6px 45px 0px 13px; line-height: 17.234px; min-height: 18.004px; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 14px;  }
.S7 { border-left: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-right: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-top: 0px none rgb(33, 33, 33); border-bottom: 0px none rgb(33, 33, 33); border-radius: 0px; padding: 0px 45px 0px 13px; line-height: 17.234px; min-height: 18.004px; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 14px;  }
.S8 { border-left: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-right: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-top: 0px none rgb(33, 33, 33); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-radius: 0px; padding: 0px 45px 4px 13px; line-height: 17.234px; min-height: 18.004px; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 14px;  }
.S9 { color: rgb(33, 33, 33); padding: 10px 0px 6px 17px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box; font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 14px; overflow-x: hidden; line-height: 17.234px;  }
.S10 { border-left: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-right: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-top: 0px none rgb(33, 33, 33); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-radius: 0px 0px 4px 4px; padding: 0px 45px 4px 13px; line-height: 17.234px; min-height: 18.004px; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 14px;  }
.S11 { border-left: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-right: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-top: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(191, 191, 191); border-radius: 4px 4px 0px 0px; padding: 6px 45px 4px 13px; line-height: 17.234px; min-height: 18.004px; white-space: nowrap; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace; font-size: 14px;  }
/* Styling that is common to warnings and errors is in diagnosticOutput.css */.embeddedOutputsErrorElement {    min-height: 18px;    max-height: 550px;}
.embeddedOutputsErrorElement .diagnosticMessage-errorType {    overflow: auto;}
.embeddedOutputsErrorElement.inlineElement {}
.embeddedOutputsErrorElement.rightPaneElement {}
/* Styling that is common to warnings and errors is in diagnosticOutput.css */.embeddedOutputsWarningElement {    min-height: 18px;    max-height: 550px;}
.embeddedOutputsWarningElement .diagnosticMessage-warningType {    overflow: auto;}
.embeddedOutputsWarningElement.inlineElement {}
.embeddedOutputsWarningElement.rightPaneElement {}
/* Copyright 2015-2019 The MathWorks, Inc. *//* In this file, styles are not scoped to rtcContainer since they could be in the Dojo Tooltip */.diagnosticMessage-wrapper {    font-family: Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Courier New", monospace;    font-size: 12px;}
.diagnosticMessage-wrapper.diagnosticMessage-warningType {    color: rgb(255,100,0);}
.diagnosticMessage-wrapper.diagnosticMessage-warningType a {    color: rgb(255,100,0);    text-decoration: underline;}
.diagnosticMessage-wrapper.diagnosticMessage-errorType {    color: rgb(230,0,0);}
.diagnosticMessage-wrapper.diagnosticMessage-errorType a {    color: rgb(230,0,0);    text-decoration: underline;}
.diagnosticMessage-wrapper .diagnosticMessage-messagePart,.diagnosticMessage-wrapper .diagnosticMessage-causePart {    white-space: pre-wrap;}
.diagnosticMessage-wrapper .diagnosticMessage-stackPart {    white-space: pre;}
.embeddedOutputsTextElement,.embeddedOutputsVariableStringElement {    white-space: pre;    word-wrap:  initial;    min-height: 18px;    max-height: 550px;}
.embeddedOutputsTextElement .textElement,.embeddedOutputsVariableStringElement .textElement {    overflow: auto;}
.textElement,.rtcDataTipElement .textElement { padding-top: 3px;}
.embeddedOutputsTextElement.inlineElement,.embeddedOutputsVariableStringElement.inlineElement {}
.inlineElement .textElement {}
.embeddedOutputsTextElement.rightPaneElement,.embeddedOutputsVariableStringElement.rightPaneElement {    min-height: 16px;}
.rightPaneElement .textElement {    padding-top: 2px;    padding-left: 9px;}
.S12 { margin: 3px 10px 5px 4px; padding: 0px; line-height: 20px; min-height: 0px; white-space: pre-wrap; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-weight: 700; text-align: left;  }</style><div class = rtcContent><span>Let's implement the advection equation in the form (1):</span></div><div  class = 'S1'><span texencoding="\frac{\partial u}{\partial t} - \nabla \cdot (D \nabla u) +  \nabla \cdot (\mathbf{v} u) = R" style="vertical-align:-15px"><img src="data:image/png;base64," width="192" height="34" /></span></div><div  class = 'S1'><span>where:</span></div>
* $u$ is the species concentration, and the variable in our equation;
* $D$ is the *diffusivity*;
* $v$ is the *velocity field*;
* $R$ describes sources or sinks, and may be a function of  and other parameters.
In the above equation, we have the following terms:
* $\nabla \times (D \nabla u)$ describes *diffusion*;
* $\nabla \times (v u)$ describes *convection*.
<div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S4'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >model = createpde();</span></span></div></div></div><div  class = 'S5'><span>Let's consider a simple geometry:</span></div><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S6'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >model.importGeometry(</span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'PlateHolePlanar.stl'</span><span >);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >figure();</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper outputs"><div  class = 'S8'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >pdegplot(model, </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'EdgeLabels'</span><span >, </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'on'</span><span >);</span></span></div><div  class = 'S9'><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height: auto;"></div></div></div><div  class = 'S5'><span>MATLAB expects an equation of the form:</span></div><div  class = 'S1'><span texencoding="m \frac{\partial^2 u}{\partial t^2} + d \frac{\partial u}{\partial t} - \nabla \cdot (c \nabla u) + au = f" style="vertical-align:-16px"><img src="data:image/png;base64," width="214.5" height="36" /></span></div><div  class = 'S1'><span>so we'll have to reorder (1) to:</span></div><div  class = 'S1'><span texencoding="\frac{\partial u}{\partial t} - \nabla \cdot (D \nabla u) =  R - \nabla \cdot (\mathbf{v} u)" style="vertical-align:-15px"><img src="data:image/png;base64," width="192" height="34" /></span></div><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S6'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >diffusivity = 1e-2;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >velocity = [0.1, 0.1];</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >source = 0;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >specifyCoefficients(model, </span><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">...</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"m"</span><span >, 0, </span><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">...</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"d"</span><span >, 1, </span><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">...</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"c"</span><span >, diffusivity, </span><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">...</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"a"</span><span >, 0, </span><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">...</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S10'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"f"</span><span >, @(x, s) iRightHandSide(x, s, velocity, source));</span></span></div></div></div><div  class = 'S5'><span>Apply an initial condition on the central circle</span></div><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S6'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >initialConcentration = 1;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >model.setInitialConditions(0);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S10'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >model.setInitialConditions(initialConcentration, </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'edge'</span><span >, 5);</span></span></div></div></div><div  class = 'S5'><span>Apply boundary conditions:</span></div><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S6'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >model.applyBoundaryCondition(</span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'neumann'</span><span >, </span><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">...</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S10'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'edge'</span><span >, 1:4, </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'q'</span><span >, 0, </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"g"</span><span >, 0);</span></span></div></div></div><div  class = 'S5'><span>Generate the mesh and show what it'll look like</span></div><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S6'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >mesh = generateMesh(model, </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"Hmax"</span><span >, 0.5);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >figure();</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper outputs"><div  class = 'S8'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >pdeplot(model);</span></span></div><div  class = 'S9'><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height: auto;"></div></div></div><div  class = 'S1'><span>Resolve the PDE:</span></div><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S6'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >timeSteps = iTimeSteps(60, 10);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S10'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >result = solvepde(model, timeSteps);</span></span></div></div></div><div  class = 'S1'><span>Show trend at some points of the solution</span></div><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S6'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >figure();</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >subplot(2, 2, 1);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >iShapshot(model, result, timeSteps, 1, initialConcentration);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >subplot(2, 2, 2);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >iShapshot(model, result, timeSteps, round(numel(timeSteps)*1/3), initialConcentration);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >subplot(2, 2, 3);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >iShapshot(model, result, timeSteps, round(numel(timeSteps)*2/3), initialConcentration);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >subplot(2, 2, 4);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper outputs"><div  class = 'S8'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >iShapshot(model, result, timeSteps, round(numel(timeSteps)*0.99), initialConcentration);</span></span></div><div  class = 'S9'><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height: auto;"></div></div></div><div  class = 'S1'><span>Visualise one particular snapshot</span></div><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S6'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >figure()</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >progressValue = </span></span><span>61</span><span style="white-space: pre"><span >;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >numStep = round(numel(timeSteps)*progressValue/100);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper outputs"><div  class = 'S8'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >iShapshot(model, result, timeSteps, numStep, initialConcentration);</span></span></div><div  class = 'S9'><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height: auto;"></div></div></div><div  class = 'S1'><span>Export the solution as a video</span></div><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper outputs"><div  class = 'S11'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >iExportResultsAsVideo(</span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"result.mp4"</span><span >, model, result, timeSteps, initialConcentration);</span></span></div><div  class = 'S9'><div class="inlineElement eoOutputWrapper embeddedOutputsWarningElement" uid="320D62B5" prevent-scroll="true" data-testid="output_4" style="width: 937px; white-space: normal; font-style: normal; color: rgb(33, 33, 33); font-size: 12px;"><div class="diagnosticMessage-wrapper diagnosticMessage-warningType eoOutputContent" data-width="907" data-height="17" data-hashorizontaloverflow="false" style="max-height: 261px; white-space: normal; font-style: normal; color: rgb(255, 148, 0); font-size: 12px;"><div class="diagnosticMessage-messagePart" style="white-space: pre-wrap; font-style: normal; color: rgb(255, 148, 0); font-size: 12px;">Warning: The video's width and height has been padded to be a multiple of two as required by the H.264 codec.</div><div class="diagnosticMessage-stackPart" style="white-space: pre; font-style: normal; color: rgb(255, 148, 0); font-size: 12px;"></div></div></div><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="height: auto;"></div></div></div><h2  class = 'S12'><span>Helper functions</span></h2><div class="CodeBlock"><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S6'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">function </span><span >f = iRightHandSide(~, state, velocity, source)</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >ux = state.ux;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >uy = state.uy;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >v = velocity;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >convection = ux*v(1)+uy*v(2);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >f = source - convection ;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">end</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">function </span><span >ts = iTimeSteps(sec, varargin)</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">if </span><span >nargin==1</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    stepsPerSecond = 60;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">else</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    stepsPerSecond = varargin{1};</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">end</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >nSteps = sec*stepsPerSecond;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >ts = linspace(0, sec, nSteps);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">end</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">function </span><span >iShapshot(model, solution, timeSteps, stepNumber, maxConcentration)</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >currSolution = solution.NodalSolution(:, stepNumber);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >pdeplot(model, </span><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">...</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'XYData'</span><span >, currSolution, </span><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">...</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'ColorMap'</span><span >, </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'jet'</span><span >, </span><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">...</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'ColorBar'</span><span >, </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"off"</span><span >);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >title(</span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"Time " </span><span >+ compose(</span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">"%2.3f"</span><span >, timeSteps(stepNumber)));</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >colorbar();</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >caxis(gca(), [0, maxConcentration]);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">end</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">function </span><span >iExportResultsAsVideo(fileName, model, result, timeSteps, maxConcentration)</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >h = figure();</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >numSteps = numel(timeSteps);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(2, 128, 9);">% create the video writer</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >writerObj = VideoWriter(fileName, </span><span style="color: rgb(170, 4, 249);">'MPEG-4'</span><span >);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >writerObj.FrameRate = 60;</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >open(writerObj);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">for </span><span >k = 1:numSteps</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    iShapshot(model, result, timeSteps, k, maxConcentration);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    </span><span style="color: rgb(2, 128, 9);">% Capture the plot as an image</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    frame = getframe(h);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >    writeVideo(writerObj, frame);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">end</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S7'><span style="white-space: pre"><span >close(writerObj);</span></span></div></div><div class="inlineWrapper"><div  class = 'S10'><span style="white-space: pre"><span style="color: rgb(14, 0, 255);">end</span></span></div></div></div>
